title: niphobolus angustatus
intro: Niphobolus angustatus, also known as Maidenhair Fern or Niphobolus fern, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is commonly found in tropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Niphobolus angustatus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Niphobolus angustatus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, tincture, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
